title: Glengor Premium Bungee Cord Set | Pack of 12 | Heavy Duty Elastic Cords | Great for Caravan, Camping, Garden, DIY, Trailers, RV’s | 2x 40cm, 2x 60cm, 4x 80cm, 4x 100cm
features: 💪🏻 HEAVY DUTY- Very sturdy and reliable, the tough premium grade bungee cord has a tensile force of 35kg, and can stretch to a maximum of two times the regular length! Stronger than many others!
📦 BUMPER PACK- Each set contains 12 Bungee Cords with Hooks on Both ends. 2x 40cm, 2x 60cm, 4x 80cm, 4x 100cm. A size for every occasion!
⛺️ MANY USES- Perfect for a wide variety of uses, and handy to keep for those emergency’s! Use on the car to secure items, suitcases, trailers, garage, camping, sports, work van and many more!
🪝STRONG RUBBER COATED HOOKS- The steel hooks are coated with rubber along with a durable rubber end cap to prevent scratches to surfaces.
🪢 DOUBLE BRAIDED CORD- The tough double braiding in black not only gives a really tough resilient protection to the internal rubber but is a neutral colour that will look neat and smart.
